data.body: There’s a final IMO v difficult problem w assessing forecasters. (See “Super Forecasters” book and research): improbable things happen. If I say there’s a 1/36 chance of rolling double 6s, but I then roll double sixes, my probability assessment wasn’t wrong. So back to the multiple N point. FIN
